place: Bang Po, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Hillside Villa with 22m Infinity Pool, Cinema & Spa - Bang Po
note: Daily breakfast · airport transfers · chef on request
blurb: A three-level hillside villa set among old coconut palms above Nathon on Koh Samui's west coast, built around a 22-metre infinity pool with sweeping views over Angthong Marine Park and the Five Islands, a private cinema, spa room and games room, and a full-width glass-walled living level that opens straight onto the pool deck.
detail:
Set into the coconut-clad hills above Nathon on Koh Samui's west coast, this hillside estate looks out over Angthong Marine Park, the Five Islands and the passing ferries and fishing boats below — a front-row seat for some of the island's best sunsets. Built across three levels around a 22-metre infinity pool, the villa holds five en-suite bedrooms and seven bathrooms, along with a poolside relaxation sala, a spa room with two massage beds and a pedicure chair, a fully equipped gym, a games room with a red pool table, a library and sun deck set over a reflecting pond, and a private cinema with a three-metre screen and reclining seats for up to twenty.

The living, dining and recreation level runs the full width of the villa and opens directly onto the pool deck: a sunken lounge, a ten-seat teak dining table beside a polished white bar, and a Western show kitchen behind frameless glass doors that fold the view straight into the room. Each bedroom is fitted with a flat-screen TV, built-in wardrobes, a personal safe and an en-suite rain shower, and two of the five have Jacuzzi baths with waterfall spouts.

Outside, a run of terraces and loungers steps down through landscaped gardens and towering palms toward the 22-metre pool — long enough for proper laps — with lower-floor bedrooms opening onto their own covered balconies. About ten minutes from Nathon town and the same again from the beach clubs and restaurants further up the west coast, the villa comes with a car for exploring the island, daily breakfast and full-time on-site staff, with a private chef available on request.

features.l: Angthong Marine Park & Five Islands views
On-site staff, daily breakfast & car included
